privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic ODP presentation file created by setup_task.sh at /home/ga/Documents/Presentations/product_launch_roadmap.odp. Slide 2 (slide_index=1) contains a bulleted list with three items: Market Analysis, Prototype Development, and Global Release. The task requires converting this list to 3 shapes with the same text aligned horizontally. The verifier checks for file modification, presence of at least 3 shapes containing the expected text items, horizontal alignment of shapes, and color variation.
